name: chrome-devtools-mcp-mux
description: [BETA — BROKEN ON WINDOWS] MCP server registration for chrome-devtools-mcp-mux multiplexer. Upstream package fails on Windows with EACCES on socket binding. Use claude-in-chrome-multisession instead for multi-session safety on Windows. Kept for non-Windows platforms where upstream may work; multi-session safety unverified there.
